original:
"A reasonable concern." Bornanew rubs his chin. "First and without doubt, a notable member of a Persean League gens is involved." 

"The rest are deduction and speculation." He starts counting off fingers, "The Cathedral of Holy Exodus has much to lose if corruption is revealed in their house; I suspect an insider or an infiltrator."

Next finger, "Within the greater Church, there is a loosely organized sect who, ah, back the theological legitimacy of relics. They would doubtless have forceful opinions on the subject of a duplicate relic, and that in secular hands."

Another finger, "The Luddic Path has much to gain from discord within the Church, and they have proximity to... the problem."

Next finger, "Though it is possible that the criminal underworld has found a means of profit here, possibly Kanta's organization. The pirate queen has an especial taste for desecration, though has demonstrated no particular hatred for the Church beyond her habitual misanthropy." He lets his hands fall.

"Beyond that, I grasp for tenuous threads, captain."

"Um. It is so obvious?" Bornanew almost looks guilty. Almost.

"The Reverend Archcurate did say that my feelings on the subject are... not easily veiled."

"This investigation requires discretion." He brings his hands together. "I shall be mindful of my disposition."

Bornanew puts his hands together, and lowers his head for a moment.

"I thank you for that, captain. In the meantime, I will do what research and inquiries I can with the resources I am provided."

"If you wish to assist my quest, then come to Gilead. The Knights have provided me an entry in the comms directory in order to further my penance."

Bornanew puts his hands together, and lowers his head.

"I understand. If you change your mind, come to Gilead. The Knights have provided me an entry in the comms directory in order to further my penance."

Bornanew puts his hands together, and lowers his head.

"I thank you for that, captain. In the meantime, I will do what research and inquiries I can with the resources I am provided."

"If you wish to assist me in my quest, contact me here on Gilead. The Knights have provided me an entry in the comms directory in order to further my penance."

Bornanew puts his hands together, and lowers his head for a moment.

"I understand. If you change your mind, return here, to Gilead. The Knights have provided me an entry in the comms directory in order to further my penance."
